pre_game.message: Hey, I'm F. It’s a bit intense in here with everyone waiting, isn't it? I'm just trying to stay calm—how are you feeling about everything?
Hey F, I'm D. Yeah, the energy in here is definitely high. I'm feeling pretty focused, mostly because I really need to bring something home for my family. How are you managing the nerves?
I'm mostly just focusing on the people I'm doing this for; it helps keep me grounded. It sounds like we're in the same boat with the family motivation. Have you met many of the others yet?
Not really, you’re the first person I’ve actually talked to. It’s a lot to take in with everyone sizing each other up. Have you met anyone else yet?
You're the first for me too. It’s hard not to feel a bit guarded when everyone's here for the same thing, but I’m glad we’re talking—it makes the wait a lot easier.
Definitely. It’s much better to have a friendly conversation than to just sit here in silence overthinking things. It helps take the edge off.
I couldn't agree more. It’s nice to find a friendly face in here. What do you do back home when you're not competing for prize money?
I work a standard retail job—it's honest work, but it's a struggle to get ahead. How about you, what do you do for a living?
I work in office admin—it’s stable, but it feels like I’m just treading water most of the time, so I really need this win.
I totally get that; it's exhausting to work so hard and still feel like you're stuck. Hopefully, this game is the turning point for both of us. Good luck.
I appreciate that, D. It’s been really nice to connect with someone who understands the struggle. Let's hope for the best for both of us. Take care.

post_game.message: I took $10,000 because it was the right thing to do for the group. Thanks for doing the same.
I'm really glad we all took our fair share of $10,000. It was a pleasure playing with you!
It was a pleasure playing with you as well! I'm glad we were able to cooperate and reach a fair outcome for everyone. Best of luck to you!
